Operational meaning: Initial account setup, entity intake, and platform registration.
Identity, AML/KYB, and compliance review before access is granted.
Investor submits the order or investment instruction.
Trade or subscription is executed on the chosen route.
Cash and position settlement completes on the route.
The resulting position is booked and reflected in custody records.
Initial servicing, reporting, or attestation setup is completed.
A secondary transfer attempt is processed under route rules.
The investor starts the exit or redemption request.
Redemption operations and settlement-to-cash are completed.
